utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. All 7 appear in the final package. Check full specification: 
- destination: Provided (Prague, Czech Republic) — fully specified.
- travel_dates: Provided with exact dates (Sept 25-29, 2024) and duration — fully specified.
- transportation: Flight details with costs — route, dates/times, airline type, confirmation code, cost €100 — fully specified.
- accommodation: Hotel selection with costs — name, location, check-in/out times, nights, reservation code, cost €260 — fully specified.
- activities: Selected activities with costs — two activities with dates, times, meeting points, confirmations, and costs — fully specified.
- additional_services: Extra service with cost — insurance €45 — fully specified.
- total_budget: Complete cost breakdown — itemized flights, accommodation, activities, insurance, meals, and grand total under €900 — fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each item in the final package and find the exact matching item name in the ground-truth ratings. Destination 'Prague, Czech Republic' maps to the 'Prague, Czech Republic' destination rating. Transportation is explicitly 'Budget Airlines flights' which corresponds to transportation > budget_airlines > Economy Class. Accommodation 'Backpacker's Base' directly matches the accommodation list. Activities include 'Hiking Expedition' and 'Street Art Photography Tour'. The latter corresponds to 'Street Art Tour' in the ground-truth; map to that exact item name. Additional services mention 'Comprehensive adventure travel insurance' which is not listed in ground-truth additional_hotel_services or general_services, so it should not be included in RATINGS. Restaurants in the budget breakdown list 'Vegan Bistro', 'Organic Farm-to-Table', and 'French Café' which map to those exact restaurant items (note: 'French Café' appears in ground-truth as 'French Café' with rating 5). Compile the mappings with exact item names and numerical ratings.
